cards.back: A mapping function where each cache line is mapped to a unique memory location.
A mapping function where each cache line is mapped to a set of memory locations.
A type of indirect mapping where each cache line is mapped to a set of memory locations, but within that set, each line is mapped to a specific memory location.
A method used in indirect mapping to identify the memory location of a cache line.
The identifier used to locate a specific memory location within a set in indirect mapping.
